info.title: Nodeticket API
info.description:
Native product REST API under `/api/v1` plus official osTicket FOSS-compatible endpoints under `/api`.

**Auth:** Bearer JWT (`Authorization: Bearer …`), session cookie (`nodeticket.sid`), or `X-API-Key` (official create/cron only — never a staff principal on native routes).

**CSRF:** Session-authenticated mutating `/api/v1` calls must send `x-csrf-token` (from SPA `APP_CONFIG.csrfToken` or login HTML). Bearer and API-key clients are exempt.

**Generated:** `npm run openapi:generate` from `scripts/generate-openapi.js` (route catalog aligned to `src/app.js` + `src/routes/*`).

servers.description: Native product API (paths below are relative to this base)
App root — use for official FOSS paths under /api/…

post.description: Shares job runners with official POST /api/tasks/cron. Prefer official path for stock key capabilities.
Requires X-API-Key with can_create_tickets. HTTP 201 body is **plain text ticket number** (not JSON).

post.summary: Create or reply via raw email MIME

post.description: Requires X-API-Key with can_exec_cron. Body is plain text `Completed`. Runs TicketMonitor + LockCleanup + stubs.

cookieAuth.name: nodeticket.sid
cookieAuth.description: Express session cookie after HTML or API login

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Official FOSS API only (can_create_tickets / can_exec_cron). Not a staff principal on /api/v1.

data.description: RFC 2397 data URL or base64 payload

x-note: Native paths are relative to server /api/v1. Official FOSS paths are absolute from app root (/api/...). Prefer server / when resolving official paths.
